raw_response: {"module_type":"sequential","exhaustive_possible":false,"total_input_bits":3,"reset_tests":[{"description":"Assert reset high for two cycles from power-on with enable both 0 and 1, verify count synchronously clears to 0 and stays 0 until reset drops","cycles":2},{"description":"Deassert reset, advance count, then reassert reset while enable remains 1 to confirm reset priority and synchronous clear on next clk edge","cycles":4}],"normal_tests":[{"description":"Incrementing sequence with enable high to check modulo-16 behavior","vectors":[{"cycle":0,"reset":0,"enable":1,"expected_count":"0000"},{"cycle":1,"reset":0,"enable":1,"expected_count":"0001"},{"cycle":2,"reset":0,"enable":1,"expected_count":"0010"},{"cycle":3,"reset":0,"enable":1,"expected_count":"0011"}]},{"description":"Hold behavior with enable low keeps count constant","vectors":[{"cycle":0,"reset":0,"enable":1,"expected_count":"0100"},{"cycle":1,"reset":0,"enable":0,"expected_count":"0100"},{"cycle":2,"reset":0,"enable":0,"expected_count":"0100"}]}],"corner_case_tests":[{"description":"Wrap-around from 1111 to 0000 with enable high and reset low","vectors":[{"cycle":0,"reset":0,"enable":1,"init_count":"1110","expected_after_cycles":[{"cycle":1,"count":"1111"},{"cycle":2,"count":"0000"}]}]},{"description":"Simultaneous reset and enable high should clear count","vectors":[{"cycle":0,"reset":0,"enable":1,"expected_count":"0011"},{"cycle":1,"reset":1,"enable":1,"expected_count":"0000"},{"cycle":2,"reset":0,"enable":1,"expected_count":"0001"}]},{"description":"Glitch resistance: toggle enable around clock edges (setup/hold) to ensure only sampled on posedge","vectors":[{"pre_clk":"enable toggles within +/-1ns of clk edge while reset=0; expect count increments exactly once per posedge, no double increments"}]}],"sequence_tests":[{"description":"Full state traversal: alternate enable bursts and holds to cover reset, increment, hold transitions","num_cycles":20,"sequence":[{"cycles":2,"reset":1,"enable":1},{"cycles":6,"reset":0,"enable":1},{"cycles":4,"reset":0,"enable":0},{"cycles":1,"reset":1,"enable":0},{"cycles":7,"reset":0,"enable":1}]}},{"description":"Reset pulse mid-count to check synchronous priority and recovery path","num_cycles":10,"sequence":[{"cycles":3,"reset":0,"enable":1},{"cycles":1,"reset":1,"enable":1},{"cycles":6,"reset":0,"enable":1}]}],"random_tests":{"num_vectors":200,"description":"Randomized enable/reset pulses with random initial counts across 200 cycles, include random single-cycle reset glitches and enable bursts to expose sequencing bugs"},"key_discriminators":["Reset sampled high on clk edge forces next-state 0 regardless of enable","Wrap-around exactly at 16 counts, no skipping or double increment","Count holds perfectly when enable=0 with reset=0, even with enable glitches near clk edge","Outputs update strictly on clk rising edge; no async reset or combinational leakage"]}
